Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.json

Class JsonSerializerSession

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.marshall.ContextSession
org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshallingSession
org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshallingTraverseSession
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.SerializerSession
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.WriterSerializerSession
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.JsonSerializerSession
All Implemented Interfaces:
BeanSession, ConverterSession, ArrayRecordWritable, RecordWritable, TokenWritable
Direct Known Subclasses:
JcsSerializerSession, Json5SerializerSession, JsonlSerializerSession, JsonSchemaSerializerSession
public class JsonSerializerSession extends WriterSerializerSession implements TokenWritable, ArrayRecordWritable
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of JsonSerializer.
Notes:
  • This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.
See Also:
  • JSON Basics

  • Method Details

    • create

      public static JsonSerializerSession.Builder<?> create(JsonSerializer ctx)
      Creates a new builder for this object.
      Parameters:
      ctx - The context creating this session.
      Cannot be null.
      Returns:
      A new builder.

    • serializeBeanMap

      protected SerializerWriter serializeBeanMap(JsonWriter out, BeanMap<?> m, String typeName) throws SerializeException

      SerializeException

      Throws:
      SerializeException

    • doSerialize

      protected void doSerialize(SerializerPipe out, Object o) throws IOException, SerializeException
      Description copied from class: SerializerSession
      Serializes a POJO to the specified pipe.

      This method should NOT close the context object.

      The default implementation of this method simply calls Serializer.doSerialize(SerializerSession,SerializerPipe,Object).

      Overrides:
      doSerialize in class SerializerSession
      Parameters:
      out - Where to send the output from the serializer.
      o - The object to serialize.
      Throws:
      IOException - Thrown by underlying stream.
      SerializeException - Problem occurred trying to serialize object.

    • getJsonClassMeta

      protected JsonClassMeta getJsonClassMeta(ClassMeta<?> cm)
      Returns the language-specific metadata on the specified class.
      Parameters:
      cm - The class to return the metadata on.
      Returns:
      The metadata.

    • getJsonWriter

      protected JsonWriter getJsonWriter(SerializerPipe out)
      Converts the specified output target object to an JsonWriter.
      Parameters:
      out - The output target object.
      Returns:
      The output target object wrapped in an JsonWriter.
      Throws:
      IOException - Thrown by underlying stream.

    • isAddBeanTypes

      public final boolean isAddBeanTypes()
      Description copied from class: SerializerSession
      Add "_type" properties when needed.
      Overrides:
      isAddBeanTypes in class SerializerSession
      Returns:
      true if "_type" properties added to beans if their type cannot be inferred through reflection.
      See Also:
      • Serializer.Builder.addBeanTypes()

    • isEscapeSolidus

      protected final boolean isEscapeSolidus()
      Prefix solidus '/' characters with escapes.
      Returns:
      true if solidus (e.g. slash) characters should be escaped.
      See Also:
      • JsonSerializer.Builder.escapeSolidus()

    • isSimpleAttrs

      protected boolean isSimpleAttrs()
      Whether the token writer emits unquoted (simple) attribute names.
      Returns:
      false for RFC-8259 strict JSON; JSON5 overrides to true.

    • serializeTokens

      public TokenWriter serializeTokens(Object output) throws IOException
      Opens a low-level push generator that emits JSON one structural event at a time, bound to this session's live config.

      The writer is purely structural — object swaps and @Schema annotations are not applied at this layer. See TokenWriter for the contract. The higher-level TokenWriter.object(Object) bridge walks an arbitrary POJO via PojoWalker and DOES honor the databind settings (keepNullProperties, trimEmptyMaps, trimEmptyCollections, sortMaps, sortCollections, trimStrings).

      Specified by:
      serializeTokens in interface TokenWritable
      Parameters:
      output - The output. Accepts Writer, OutputStream, File, or StringBuilder.
      Returns:
      A new JsonTokenWriter.
      Throws:
      IOException - If the output type is not supported or could not be opened.

    • serializeArrayRecords

      public RecordWriter serializeArrayRecords(Object output) throws IOException
      Streaming array-element RecordWriter backed by JsonTokenWriter. Memory is O(1) in the array length — elements are emitted as they arrive.
      Specified by:
      serializeArrayRecords in interface ArrayRecordWritable
      Parameters:
      output - The output.
      Returns:
      A new element-streamed RecordWriter.
      Throws:
      IOException - If a problem occurred opening the underlying output.

    • serializeAnything

      protected JsonWriter serializeAnything(JsonWriter out, Object o, ClassMeta<?> eType, String attrName, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws SerializeException
      Workhorse method. Determines the type of object, and then calls the appropriate type-specific serialization method.
      Parameters:
      out - The output writer.
      o - The object to serialize.
      eType - The expected type.
      attrName - The attribute name.
      pMeta - The bean property currently being parsed.
      Returns:
      The same writer passed in.
      Throws:
      SerializeException - General serialization error occurred.

    • serializeJson

      protected String serializeJson(Object o) throws Exception
      Method that can be called from subclasses to serialize an object to JSON.

      Used by JsonSchemaSerializerSession for serializing examples to JSON.

      Parameters:
      o - The object to serialize.
      Returns:
      The serialized object.
      Throws:
      Exception - Error occurred.
